Update Highlights:
1. Optimized the duration of the Sacred Tribute Vessel, which is now set to 3 hours.
2. Improved the display of Guild Chest information by removing portrait frames.
3. Other optimizations and bug fixes.

title: Family Farm Seaside®
notes:
New Features & Improvements:

- Decoration System: The Creativity Catalyst is now available! Earn Creativity points and embark on a brand-new growth journey.
- Cloud Aquarium: Fish caught via the Fishing Zeppelin can now be placed in the Cloud Aquarium. They'll thank you with Creativity points and beautiful pearls!
- Sweetlings: Claim your very own Sweetling companion! Grow your Affinity with it, and it will be a loyal friend throughout your adventures!

title: Idle Office Tycoon-Money game
notes:
Boss, get ready for a brand-new surprise on the City Board!
A mysterious new mini-game is arriving on the City Board! Choose the right boxes to stack up massive diamond rewards… but one wrong pick could change everything. How far will you push your luck?
